Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Text Ruling

Mtn For Apportionment Proceeding & For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion Apportionment Proceeding and for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Christopher Andreas, Esq. for Plaintiffs' Scott Allgood, of the Estate of Diana Fletcher, Deceased, and on behalf of the Legal Heirs of Diana Fletcher, Deceased.
No appearance by the Plaintiffs and no oppositions.
The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and considered the evidence, grants the Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds, Attorneys' Fees and Costs. See scanned doc. for details of the Order.
Order signed in open court.
